title: Fork tenacitOS repo, create steel-city branch, set up .env.local
description: Fork tenacitOS repo, create `steel-city` branch, set up `.env.local` with correct paths, admin password, auth secret. Verify `npm run dev` works; login works; agents page shows our 11 agents.
acceptance_criteria: Agents page shows 11 Steel City agents

title: Verify all existing tenacitOS features work
description: Verify all existing tenacitOS features work against our `/data/.openclaw` data structure (agents, costs, cron, sessions, files). Smoke test checklist passes: agents list, costs chart, cron list, memory browser all populated.

title: Create docker-compose.mission-control.yml
description: Create `docker-compose.mission-control.yml` with correct volume mounts (`/data/.openclaw` read-only), env vars, port 3456, healthcheck. Container starts cleanly; accessible at port 3456 from host.

title: Steel City AI branding spec
description: Steel City AI branding spec: color tokens (steel-dark bg, Pittsburgh gold #FFB612, steel blue #4A90D9, error red), typography, logo. Mike approves before D-02.

title: UX flow for Department Tasks panel
description: UX flow for Department Tasks panel (kanban-style columns per department, task card anatomy). Wireframe or annotated sketch; covers task card states (todo/in-progress/blocked/done).

title: UX flow for Workflow Orchestration panel
description: UX flow for Workflow Orchestration panel (agent selector, task input, dispatch confirmation). Wireframe covering happy path + error state.

title: 3D Office agent desk layout for 11 agents
description: 3D Office agent desk layout for 11 agents (position grid, department zones, color assignments). Updated `agentsConfig.ts` values with correct positions and colors per department.

title: Apply Steel City branding
description: Apply Steel City branding: update `branding.ts` + `.env.local` vars (app title, company name, emoji, avatar). App shows 'Steel City AI' in header/tab/office; Pittsburgh-black background; logo renders.
acceptance_criteria: App shows 'Steel City AI' in header/tab

title: Tailwind theme override
description: Tailwind theme override: steel-dark palette (charcoal `#1A1C20` bg, Pittsburgh gold `#FFB612` accent, steel blue `#4A90D9`) applied globally via CSS custom properties. Home dashboard renders with Steel City colors; existing components inherit theme; contrast >= 4.5:1.

title: Agent Roster Config
description: Agent Roster Config: update `agentsConfig.ts` with all 11 Steel City agents (id, name, emoji, position, color, role, department). 3D Office shows 11 named desks; Yoda center, departments grouped spatially.

title: GET /api/projects API route
description: `GET /api/projects` API route: scan workspace `projects/*/` directories, read README.md for title + description, read project markdown files for status/milestone data. Returns typed JSON: `[{id, name, description, status, lastModified, taskCount}]`.
acceptance_criteria: Returns typed JSON with project data

title: GET /api/departments + GET /api/tasks API routes
description: `GET /api/departments` + `GET /api/tasks` API routes: read task board markdown files from workspace; parse SC-MCC task ID format; group by department. Returns tasks grouped by department with status (todo/in-progress/done) and assignee.

title: Project Overview page
description: Project Overview page (`/projects`): list active projects with progress bar (% done), last updated, link to project folder. Page shows all projects from `workspace/projects/`; progress derived from task completion ratio.

title: Department Tasks page
description: Department Tasks page (`/departments`): 7 department columns (Research, Architecture, Build, Design, QA, Growth, Reporting); task cards with status badge, priority, assignee, task ID. All 7 departments visible; tasks update on page refresh; filter by status works.
acceptance_criteria: Task cards show status badge, priority, assignee, task ID

title: Enhance existing agents page
description: Enhance existing agents page: add department grouping (Research/Architecture/Build/Design/QA/Growth/Reporting rows), show current session key + active subagent count per agent. Agents page groups by department; shows 'active' badge if session running.

title: Enhance existing activity SSE stream
description: Enhance existing activity SSE stream (`/api/activities/stream`): parse OpenClaw session JSONL files to extract live tool calls (tool_use events); map to agent names. Live Activity feed shows 'Luke: exec(npm test)', 'R2: read(PROJECT_PLAN_v3)', etc. with <5s lag.

title: Real-time Agent Activity panel
description: Real-time Agent Activity panel (new sidebar section): per-agent 'current task' card showing agent name, current tool call, model, tokens this session; auto-refresh every 5s. Home dashboard shows 11 agent cards; active agents show current tool call; idle agents show last activity.
acceptance_criteria: Active agents show current tool call

title: Workflow Orchestration page
description: Workflow Orchestration page (`/orchestrate`): replace static Carlos workflows with Steel City workflow definitions; add 'Launch Workflow' button that sends task to specific agent via `chat.send` through OpenClaw Gateway. Can select agent (Yoda/R2/etc.), type task, click Launch; task dispatched; confirmation shown.

title: POST /api/orchestrate route
description: `POST /api/orchestrate` route: validates payload, logs dispatch to activity DB, calls `openclaw` CLI to spawn subagent or send message to specified agent session. API logs all dispatches; safety: rate limit 10 launches/hour; rejects unknown agent IDs.

title: GET /api/memory/agents route
description: `GET /api/memory/agents` route: query mem0 REST API (`/v1/memories/?user_id=mike`); group by agent_id metadata tag if present; cache 60s in-memory. Returns memories array from mem0; includes agent association where tagged.

title: GET /api/memory/search route
description: `GET /api/memory/search` route: extend existing file-based search to also query mem0 `POST /v1/memories/search/` with query; merge + deduplicate results. Search results page shows both file memories and mem0 semantic results.

title: Extend Memory page
description: Extend Memory page (`/memory`): add 'mem0 Memories' tab alongside existing file browser; per-agent filter dropdown; semantic search input; pagination (50/page). Memory page has two tabs: Files (existing) + mem0 Cloud (new); search works across both.

title: POST /api/pm-sync route
description: `POST /api/pm-sync` route: stub endpoint that accepts task data (id, title, status, assignee, department) and queues it for OBWON to process; writes to `data/pm-sync-queue.json`. Endpoint accepts valid task payloads; queue file created; returns 202 Accepted.

title: PM sync status widget
description: PM sync status widget: small card on home dashboard showing queue depth, last sync timestamp, target PM tool name (configured via env var `PM_TOOL_NAME`). Widget visible on home; shows 'Linear: 3 tasks pending sync' or similar.

title: OBWON integration docs
description: OBWON integration docs: `docs/pm-sync-protocol.md` describing the queue format, how OBWON should consume it, and the task data schema. Markdown doc in repo; OBWON can implement sync independently.

title: Security audit of new routes
description: Security audit of new routes: path traversal in `/api/projects` and `/api/tasks` file readers; validate all paths are within allowed prefixes from `paths.ts`. No path escape possible; unit tests for path validation.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests for path validation pass

title: Orchestration safety audit
description: Orchestration safety audit: `/api/orchestrate` input validation (agent ID allowlist, task length limit, rate limiting); ensure no arbitrary command injection. Penetration test: malformed payloads rejected; agent ID not in roster -> 400.

title: End-to-end smoke test
description: End-to-end smoke test: auth flow, departments page, projects page, launch workflow, memory search (both file + mem0). Manual test checklist; document pass/fail per feature.

title: Cross-device check
description: Cross-device check: Chrome desktop, Safari iOS (Mike's phone) - all new pages render correctly. No layout breaks; touch-friendly on mobile.

title: Docker container validation
description: Docker container validation: env vars correctly applied, workspace volume readable, port 3456 accessible, health endpoint returns 200. `docker-compose up` clean start; remote access confirmed.

title: Steel City Mission Control User Guide
description: Steel City Mission Control User Guide: `docs/user-guide.md` covering all pages (existing tenacitOS + new SC panels), keyboard shortcuts, how to launch workflows, how to search mem0. Markdown doc covering every page; Mike can self-serve after reading it.

title: Project completion report
description: Project completion report: build time vs estimate, features delivered, outstanding backlog items. Delivered when all milestones complete.

title: Create all SC-MCC3-* tasks in project tracking tool
description: Create all SC-MCC3-* tasks in project tracking tool with correct department labels and priority. All tasks visible; assigned to correct agent. (Note: PM tool pending Mike's decision - Linear/Jira/Asana)
acceptance_criteria: All 34 tasks created in PM tool

title: Implement OBWON-side consumer of pm-sync-queue.json
description: Implement OBWON-side consumer of `data/pm-sync-queue.json` from the dashboard (per B-18 protocol). OBWON reads queue, pushes to Linear/Jira, marks items synced.
